Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.ObjectSwap

Packages that use ObjectSwap
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects

OpenAPI UI Generator

Predefined Swaps

  • Uses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.bean.hal

    Subclasses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HalLinkOrArraySwap
    Per-property ObjectSwap applied to HAL _links maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a single HalLink (JSON object) or a HalLinkArray (JSON array) per the spec.
    class 
    HalResourceOrArraySwap
    Per-property ObjectSwap applied to HAL _embedded maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a single HalResource (JSON object) or a HalResourceArray (JSON array) per the spec.

  • Uses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi

    Subclasses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap
    Per-property ObjectSwap applied to JSON:API links maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a JSON string URL or a JsonApiLink JSON object per the spec.

  • Uses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema

    Subclasses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    JsonSchema.BooleanOrSchemaArraySwap
    Used during parsing to convert the additionalItems property to the correct class type.
    static class 
    JsonSchema.BooleanOrSchemaSwap
    Used during parsing to convert the additionalProperties property to the correct class type.
    static class 
    JsonSchema.JsonSchemaOrSchemaArraySwap
    Used during parsing to convert the items property to the correct class type.
    static class 
    JsonSchema.JsonTypeOrJsonTypeArraySwap
    Used during parsing to convert the type property to the correct class type.

  • Uses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall that return ObjectSwap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected ObjectSwap<?,?>
    ClassMeta.findSwap(Class<?> c)
     
    protected ObjectSwap<?,?>
    ClassMeta.findUnswap(Class<?> c)
     
    protected ObjectSwap<?,?>
    ClassMeta.getChildObjectSwapForSwap(Class<?> normalClass)
    Returns the ObjectSwap where the specified class is the same/subclass of the normal class of one of the child POJO swaps associated with this class.
    protected ObjectSwap<?,?>
    ClassMeta.getChildObjectSwapForUnswap(Class<?> swapClass)
    Returns the ObjectSwap where the specified class is the same/subclass of the swap class of one of the child POJO swaps associated with this class.
    ObjectSwap<T,?>
    ClassMeta.getSwap(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns the ObjectSwap associated with this class that's the best match for the specified session.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall that return types with arguments of type ObjectSwap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final List<ObjectSwap<?,?>>
    MarshallingContext.getSwaps()
    Java object swaps.
    final List<ObjectSwap<?,?>>
    MarshallingSession.getSwaps()
    Java object swaps.

  • Uses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections with parameters of type ObjectSwap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> T
    MarshalledMap.getSwapped(String key, ObjectSwap<T,?> objectSwap)
    Same as get(), but converts the raw value to the specified class type using the specified POJO swap.

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Object
    SerializerSession.swap(ObjectSwap swap, Object o)
    Invokes the specified swap on the specified object if the swap is not null.

  • Uses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap

    Subclasses of ObjectSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AutoListSwap<T>
    A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts objects to Lists.
    class 
    AutoMapSwap<T>
    A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts Objects to serializable Maps.
    class 
    AutoNumberSwap<T>
    A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts Objects to Number serializable objects.
    class 
    AutoObjectSwap<T>
    A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts Objects to serializable objects.
    class 
    AutoStringSwap<T>
    A dynamic string swap that serializes objects via Object.toString() and deserializes via fromString(String), valueOf(String), or a single-String-argument constructor.
    class 
    FunctionalSwap<T,S>
    A subclass of ObjectSwap that allows swap and unswap methods to be defined as functions.
    class 
    MapSwap<T>
    Abstract subclass for object swaps that swap objects for object maps.
    class 
    StringSwap<T>
    Abstract subclass for object swaps that swap objects for strings.
    class 
    SurrogateSwap<T,F>
    Specialized ObjectSwap for Surrogate classes.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final ObjectSwap
    ObjectSwap.NULL
    Represents a non-existent object swap.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ObjectSwap<?,?>
    AutoListSwap.find(MarshallingContext bc, ClassInfo ci)
    Look for constructors and methods on this class and construct a dynamic swap if it's possible to do so.
    static ObjectSwap<?,?>
    AutoMapSwap.find(MarshallingContext bc, ClassInfo ci)
    Look for constructors and methods on this class and construct a dynamic swap if it's possible to do so.
    static ObjectSwap<?,?>
    AutoNumberSwap.find(MarshallingContext bc, ClassInfo ci)
    Look for constructors and methods on this class and construct a dynamic swap if it's possible to do so.
    static ObjectSwap<?,?>
    AutoObjectSwap.find(MarshallingContext bc, ClassInfo ci)
    Inspects the specified class and returns a swap of this type if possible.
    static ObjectSwap<?,?>
    DefaultSwaps.find(ClassInfo ci)
    Find the default ObjectSwap for the specified class.
    ObjectSwap<T,?>
    ObjectSwap.forMediaTypes(MediaType[] mediaTypes)
    Sets the media types that this swap is associated with.
    ObjectSwap<T,?>
    ObjectSwap.withTemplate(String template)
    Sets the template string on this swap.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BinarySwap
    Thin delegating swap for top-level byte[] values in textual serializers.
    class 
    ClassFormatSwap
    Thin delegating swap for Class values driven by the context-configured ClassFormat.
    class 
    InputStreamSwap
    Transforms InputStreams to Strings.
    static class 
    InputStreamSwap.Base64
    Converts InputStreams to BASE-64 encoding.
    static class 
    InputStreamSwap.Hex
    Converts InputStreams to hex encoding.
    static class 
    InputStreamSwap.SpacedHex
    Converts InputStreams to spaced-hex encoding.
    class 
    MarshallingStringSwap<T>
    Transforms beans into Strings by simply calling the Object.toString() method.
    class 
    MatchResultSwap
    Transforms MatchResults to List objects.
    class 
    ParsedReaderSwap
    Transforms the contents of a Reader into an Object.
    static class 
    ParsedReaderSwap.Html
    Reader transform for reading HTML text.
    static class 
    ParsedReaderSwap.Json
    Reader transform for reading JSON text.
    static class 
    ParsedReaderSwap.PlainText
    Reader transform for reading plain text.
    static class 
    ParsedReaderSwap.Uon
    Reader transform for reading plain text.
    static class 
    ParsedReaderSwap.UrlEncoding
    Reader transform for reading plain text.
    static class 
    ParsedReaderSwap.Xml
    Reader transform for reading XML text.
    class 
    ReaderSwap
    Transforms Readers to Strings.
    class 
    StackTraceElementSwap
    Transforms StackTraceElements to String objects.
    class 
    StringFormatSwap
    Built-in object swap implementation class for the @MarshalledProp(format) annotation.
    class 
    UrlSwap
    Transforms URL objects to and from Strings.
